steps.title: Spot the completing signal
steps.content: The phrase “In this way” anchors the blank to the freedom just described: Fornés could direct her experimental plays exactly as she intended in off-off Broadway. The blank must show what she accomplished or demonstrated through this freedom.

steps.title: Match Fornés to the opportunity
steps.content: Fornés becomes an example of the artistic opportunity described above—she exemplifies what an artist can achieve with off-off Broadway's freedom to direct experimental work exactly as envisioned. The other three either shift focus away from this exemplification (A and B introduce cost and complexity, which the passage never mentions) or contradict the passage's celebration of experimental work as valuable (C treats it as a missed opportunity). That matches choice D — D is correct.
